label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistics and pricing data cited or estimated in the study

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a specific technology's capabilities or lifecycle status at time of study

label: Security Assessment
definition: Assessment of security vulnerabilities or threat landscape for specific technologies

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Professional judgment or qualitative assessment by the study author or cited expert

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking assessment of technology or market viability and projected outcomes

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospective observation of what actually occurred following the study's predictions

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of business strategies or decision frameworks recommended in the study

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Assessment based on professional expertise and industry knowledge of the analyst

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Analysis based on industry data collection and market intelligence

label: Document Review
definition: Assessment based on review of published documentation such as vendor support policies and threat databases

label: Market Study
definition: Research publication analyzing market conditions and providing strategic recommendations

label: Desktop Lifecycle Management
definition: Management of enterprise desktop computing assets through procurement and retirement cycles

label: Operating System
definition: System software managing computer hardware and providing services for application software

label: Server Operating System
definition: Operating system designed for server hardware and network service workloads

label: Email Server
definition: Server software providing email messaging and collaboration services

label: Database
definition: Software system for storing and managing structured data

label: Productivity Suite
definition: Bundled office application software for document creation and business tasks

label: Processor
definition: Central processing unit microchip executing computer program instructions

label: Chipset
definition: Set of integrated circuits managing data flow between processor and peripherals

label: Mobile Platform
definition: Integrated hardware and software platform for portable computing devices

label: Malware
definition: Software designed to damage or gain unauthorized access to computer systems

label: Communication Protocol
definition: Standardized rules for data exchange between computing systems

label: End of Life
definition: Product no longer receiving vendor support or security updates

label: Current Generation
definition: Product actively sold and fully supported by vendor at time of assessment

label: Pre-Release
definition: Product announced but not yet commercially available at time of assessment

label: Legacy
definition: Product no longer actively marketed but may still receive limited support

label: Declining
definition: Product losing market share and approaching end of active support

label: Obsolete
definition: Product no longer in use or supported in any meaningful capacity

label: Active Threat
definition: Malware or vulnerability currently being exploited in the wild

label: Mature
definition: Technology well-established and stable but not necessarily growing

label: Active Evolved
definition: Product line still active but has evolved significantly from the version referenced
